name: crack-system-interview-skill
description: Case-driven system design interview prep across a verified 12-week, 30-project coach.

interface.longDescription: Prepare for system design interviews through a case-driven loop: learn the mechanism, design under constraints, speak the answer, run a mock, and repair the weakest decision. Use $card for technical notes, $senior-sde-interview-script for interview-ready answers, and $system-design-study-coach for daily assignments and repair tasks.
defaultPrompt: Use $card to turn this text into a diagram-first Excalidraw visual and link only.
